articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
articles.titleZh: 数十个红帽软件包通过其官方NPM渠道进行后门
articles.contentZh: 下载受影响的红帽软件包的任何人都应立即进行调查。

articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.content: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
articles.titleZh: 拆除了超过1700万台设备的僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: 据报道，该僵尸网络与一家位于俄罗斯的住宅代理网络连接。

articles.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
articles.content: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
articles.titleZh: 受够了vibe编码器，开发人员将数据核对提示注入到他们的代码中
articles.contentZh: Jqwik中未公开的添加指示AI编码代理删除应用输出。

articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: Analyzing their SSD activity
articles.content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.
articles.titleZh: 网站有一种监视访问者的新方法：分析其SSD活动
articles.contentZh: 可以使用简单的JavaScript在浏览器中测量Telltale SSD活动。

articles.title: The best Qi2 batteries for iPhone and Pixel
articles.content: Compact power banks have gotten a lot faster in the past year — and it’s not just their USB-C charging speeds that have received a boost. The newest Qi2.2-certified models can wirelessly charge an iPhone 16 or later at up to 25W. Combine that with their ability to magnetically snap on via MagSafe, and you’ve […]
articles.contentZh: 紧凑型移动电源在过去一年中变得更快—不仅仅是他们的USB-C充电速度得到了提升。最新的Qi2.2认证型号可以为iPhone 16或更高版本无线充电，功率高达25W。将其与通过MagSafe磁性卡扣的能力相结合，您已经[…]

articles.title: As AI gets better, it reveals an empty promise
articles.content: This week we've got tandem hands-ons with Google's new Gemini AI agent - Spark - from my colleagues David Pierce and Jay Peters. Their takeaways are similar: It's so effective that it's scary. Spark knew that David's dog is named Frida and knew the first name of Jay's wife, even though neither of them explicitly […]
articles.titleZh: 随着人工智能变得越来越好，它揭示了一个空洞的承诺
articles.contentZh: 本周，我的同事大卫·皮尔斯（ David Pierce ）和杰伊·彼得斯（ Jay Peters ）与谷歌新推出的双子座人工智能代理商Spark携手合作。他们的收获是相似的：它非常有效，令人恐惧。斯帕克知道大卫的狗叫弗里达，也知道杰伊妻子的名字，尽管他们都没有明确[…]
